Title: CLICK Unread Filter with Mixed Messages
Preconditions:
User logged in
Inbox contains 3 unread and 5 read messages
Currently viewing [All Chats]
Steps:
1. NAVIGATE to **[Inbox]** page
2. CLICK **[Unread]** filter
Expected Result:
SHOULD display only 3 unread messages.
SHOULD hide all 5 read messages.
SHOULD show unread count badge "3".

Title: CLICK All Chats Filter from Unread View
Preconditions:
User logged in
[Unread] filter active
3 unread and 5 read messages exist
Steps:
1. NAVIGATE to **[Inbox]** page
2. CLICK **[Unread]** filter
3. CLICK **[All Chats]** filter
Expected Result:
SHOULD display all 8 messages.
SHOULD show messages in chronological order.
SHOULD remove unread filter.

Title: CLICK Unread Filter with Seven Read and Three Unread
Preconditions:
User logged in
Inbox contains 7 read and 3 unread messages
Currently viewing [All Chats]
Steps:
1. NAVIGATE to **[Inbox]** page
2. CLICK **[Unread]** filter
Expected Result:
SHOULD hide all 7 read messages.
SHOULD display only 3 unread messages.
SHOULD apply filtering logic correctly.

Title: CLICK Unread Message with Sticky View Active
Preconditions:
User logged in
[Unread] filter applied
Message A and Message B both unread
Steps:
1. NAVIGATE to **[Inbox]** page
2. CLICK **[Unread]** filter
3. CLICK Message A
Test data:
Message A: unread
Message B: unread
Expected Result:
SHOULD change Message A status to Read.
SHOULD decrement unread count by 1.
SHOULD keep Message A visible in list.

Title: CLICK Second Unread Message After Reading First
Preconditions:
User logged in
[Unread] filter active
Message A read but visible (sticky)
Message B unread
Steps: 1. CLICK Message B
Test data:
Message A: read (sticky)
Message B: unread
Expected Result:
SHOULD remove Message A from list immediately.
SHOULD open Message B.
SHOULD change Message B to Read.
SHOULD keep Message B visible.

Title: CLICK All Chats Then Return to Unread Filter
Preconditions:
User logged in
[Unread] filter active
Message A read but still visible (sticky)
2 other unread messages exist
Steps:
1. CLICK **[All Chats]** filter
2. CLICK **[Unread]** filter
Test data:
Message A: read (sticky)
2 other unread messages
Expected Result:
SHOULD remove Message A from list.
SHOULD display only 2 truly unread messages.
SHOULD clean up sticky state.

Title: CLICK Unread Message Then Navigate Away and Return

User logged in

3 other unread messages

Title: CLICK All Unread Messages Sequentially Until Empty

Title: CLICK Unread Filter After Marking Message as Unread
Preconditions:
User logged in
Message A was read
User marked Message A as unread via context menu
Currently viewing [All Chats]
Steps:
1. NAVIGATE to **[Inbox]** page
2. CLICK **[All Chats]** filter
3. HOVER over Message A
4. CLICK **[...]** menu
5. CLICK **[Mark as unread]**
6. CLICK **[Unread]** filter
Expected Result:
SHOULD display Message A in unread list.
SHOULD increment unread count by 1.
SHOULD treat marked message as unread.

Title: CLICK Unread Message Then Search Chat Room

5. INPUT "test" into **[Search]** field
Expected Result:
SHOULD maintain sticky view during search.
SHOULD filter messages by search term.
SHOULD keep unread filter active.

Title: CLICK Unread Message Then Send Reply

User logged in

2. CLICK **[Unread]** filter
3. CLICK Message A

6. CLICK **[Send]** button
Expected Result:
SHOULD mark Message A as read.
SHOULD send reply successfully.
SHOULD keep Message A visible (sticky).
SHOULD decrement unread count.
